# Vendor Code

Copied upstream/reference code used by this project.

## `tr19-moddisplay/`

Source: `../../tr19-badge/upstream/tr19-badge-firmware/ports/esp32/moddisplay/`

Reason: the TR22 badge display is believed to be exactly the same as the TR19 display, making this the best starting point for display bring-up.

License: see `TR19-FIRMWARE-LICENSE` and the headers inside the copied files.
